infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Threadline uses the microphone so you can add connections by speaking.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Threadline converts your speech into a connection entry.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Threadline to use the microphone to add connections by voice.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow Threadline to convert your speech to text.
